app.word: Enter your moneymotion API key (starts with mk_live_ or mk_test_).
Enter the webhook signing secret from your moneymotion dashboard. Used to verify webhook payloads.
You will be redirected to moneymotion to complete your payment.
Your payment is being processed. You will be redirected shortly.
Payment was cancelled. Please try again.
Payment failed. Please try again or use a different payment method.
Payment successful! Your order is being processed.
Could not connect to moneymotion. Please try again later.
